text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Trying to place an edict on this
academy's nightingale, I see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I swear, you too are simply making a mountain
out of a molehill. Pain, no matter the type, is
trivial for the Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Be it a gash from a frigid blade of ice or a
searing wound from a raging fire!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! But I will not kneel. My determination
shall be known! In fact, I could convey it through
operatic expression this very moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's it! We will dance! Now is the time to
compose a new ballad!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My courage in the face of hardship will lift the
spirits of all—my own too, of course.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This pain shall become my strength. Trainer, let us
go to the dance studio posthaste!
choice_data_list: ...All right, let's give it a go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This pain shall become my strength. Trainer, let us
go to the dance studio posthaste!
choice_data_list: ...All right, let's give it a go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are you telling me my efforts to encourage will
only elicit tears of despair?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If you say so, I must hold back. After all, the Overlord must only inspire joy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
While unfortunate, relenting appears to be best. I
shall review past scripts in the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A crestfallen T.M. Opera O lies down in bed... and
focuses on her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't understand her reasoning, but if she's this
motivated, I'll take the chance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This swan spreads her injured wings in search of
the heavens. If she cannot take to the skies, then
she must dance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Laaa-di-da-di-daaa! ♪Dooo-di-do-di... Ack?!
choice_data_list: Whoa! Did you twist your ankle?!
Whoa! Did you twist your ankle?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Strength is a double-edged sword... But that is
but another aspect... of beauty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a careless twirl, she twists her ankle and
collapses in pain. We take the time necessary for
her to recover.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hum-di-duuum ♪ Mm-mm-hmmm ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Perfect! The strength and grace of a swan
taking to the sky is embodied through these
movements!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well? Did I appear injured to you during my
opera?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Haaah ha ha! Stand back and observe,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For this moment marks the birth of my magnum
opus!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having saw no signs of an injury during her dance,
we start training again right after!
